task: Identify, create, and setup all proper environment variables for n8n self-hosting (ALL FREE FEATURES), apply to /home/drdave/workspace/my-github/repos/n8n, verify 100% healthy

stories.title: Research and catalogue all free-tier env vars from @Env() decorators
stories.description: Exhaustively scan every @Env() decorator across packages/@n8n/config/src/configs/ and packages/core/src/binary-data/ to identify every configurable env var, annotate each as free or EE-only.
acceptanceCriteria: All @Env() decorated vars in packages/@n8n/config/src/configs/*.ts have been read
Binary data config (packages/core/src/binary-data/binary-data.config.ts) has been read
CLI module configs (community-packages, insights, otel, push, redaction, runtime-credentials, token-exchange, quick-connect) have been read
EE-only modules (.ee suffix) have been identified and excluded: source-control.ee, external-secrets.ee, dynamic-credentials.ee
Free-tier vars are categorized: identity, security, database, execution, auth, AI, packages, runners, logging, metrics, API, templates, email, binary-data, workflow, MCP, insights, diagnostics

stories.title: Write comprehensive .env.local covering all free self-hosting features
stories.description: Create a fully filled-in .env.local at /home/drdave/workspace/my-github/repos/n8n/.env.local that enables every free n8n feature with sensible production-ready defaults for self-hosting.
acceptanceCriteria: .env.local exists at /home/drdave/workspace/my-github/repos/n8n/.env.local and is larger than the 2.7K stub copy of .env.local.example
N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY is set to a non-empty random value (critical for credential encryption)
N8N_USER_FOLDER is set to a concrete path (not blank)

All free-feature categories have a dedicated section: instance-identity, security, database, execution, auth/jwt, AI, community-packages, task-runners, logging, metrics, public-api, templates, email, binary-data, workflow, MCP, insights, telemetry
No EE-only variables are set (source-control, external-secrets, dynamic-credentials, SAML, OIDC SSO)
N8N_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED is explicitly set (user choice on telemetry)
N8N_AI_ENABLED is set to true to unlock AI nodes and workflow builder
N8N_COMMUNITY_PACKAGES_ENABLED is set to true to enable community node installation
N8N_RUNNERS_MODE is set to internal (JS/Python code nodes work without separate process)
N8N_PYTHON_ENABLED is set to true (Python code node enabled)
N8N_MFA_ENABLED is set to true
N8N_PUBLIC_API_DISABLED is set to false
N8N_METRICS is set to true (Prometheus endpoint enabled)
File has clear section headers with source file references matching the actual config files

stories.title: Verify n8n instance is 100% healthy with the new .env.local
stories.description: Start n8n from source using the new .env.local and confirm the healthz endpoint returns 200 and no critical errors appear in the startup log.
acceptanceCriteria: n8n starts without crashing (exit code remains 0 after 10s)
curl -sf http://localhost:5678/healthz returns HTTP 200
Startup log contains no ERROR or FATAL level entries
curl http://localhost:5678/rest/settings returns valid JSON with instanceId field
n8n process is cleanly terminated after verification
